title: Crufts Pet Cooling Vest in Colour Box, Small
description: Product Description Crufts Small Pet Cooling Vest In Colour Box. Crufts Small Pet Cooling Vest In Colour Box w/o Carry Handle, Accessory The dog cooling vest will provide maximum cooling and comfort for your dogs. The wicking outer layer facilitates water evaporation, absorbent middle layer stores water for evaporation and the comfortable inner layer transfers cooling effect to the dog. The light-colored vest keeps the sun off your dog's back for additional heat relief. The cooling vest for dogs is made of non-toxic and lightweight material, allowing your pets to run and play without any restriction. Tips for Use: Soak the cool coats in cold water, wring out the extra water, dress your pets from front legs and lock vest from the back, then it is ready to cool your pets. Rewet the vest as needed as water evaporates to recharge the cooling action. The cooling vest can be washed by hand and last for years. Size: Small - Back: - 20 cm / Neck: - 26 cm / Chest: 29 - 31 cm. Box Contains Small pet cooling vest
